title: Incorporated companies in the United Kingdom - February 2016
body: " We’re proposing to change the size and format of our statistical releases and the frequency we publish them.  Read more information on the proposal or access the consultation on Companies House statistical products.   Monthly statistics on companies, including the number of incorporations, dissolutions, documents registered and the total size of the register at Companies House.  See also: Incorporated companies in the United Kingdom (month to month and week to week from April 2011 to February 2016.  Previous statistics You can read previous statistics releases for incorporated companies or statistics releases from previous years can be found on The National Archives. "
